label: isabelle: build worktree session (build -D)
args: import os, pathlib, subprocess, sys; root = os.environ.get('ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT') or os.getcwd(); has_root = (pathlib.Path(root) / 'ROOT').is_file() or (pathlib.Path(root) / 'ROOTS').is_file(); cmd = ['isabelle', 'build', '-D', root] if has_root else ['isabelle', 'process_theories', '-D', root]; (not has_root) and print(f"[isabelle-zed] No ROOT/ROOTS in {root}; fallback to process_theories -D", file=sys.stderr); raise SystemExit(subprocess.run(cmd).returncode)
